Generic_SeatFunctionEnable.description:
Bit Encoding for manual component request by HMI (like ACR_Retract, ABL_Retract, ISB Overwrite) | Signalvalues: 1 = Seat FL enable
2 = Seat FR enable
4 = Seat R1 enable
8 = Seat R2 enable
16 = Seat RR enable
